channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mr. Rogers’ Death, 23 Years Later: Remembering the Iconic Host's Final Days
item.description: Children's TV host Fred Rogers died at age 74 in February 2003

item.title: What Are the Members of Wings Now? Here's What Happened to Paul McCartney's Post-Beatles Band
item.description: The Beatles broke up in 1970 and Paul McCartney went on to form the band Wings

item.title: I'm Ditching My Stiff Jeans for These Soft, Lightweight $24 Satin Pants from Christie Brinkley's Clothing Line
Rihanna Teases New Music as She Reveals She's in the Studio During Glimpse into a Day in Her Life
item.description: The musician headed to the music studio in the early hours of the morning in an Instagram video shared Thursday, Feb. 26

item.title: Carolyn Bessette-Kennedy Defined the ’90s Uniform — I’m Recreating Her Looks with Vintage-Inspired Pieces from $8
item.description: Shop Levi’s jeans, trench coats, button-downs, and more

item.title: '1000-lb Sisters' Star Amy Undergoes Surgery to Correct Lazy Eye, on Video

item.title: 'Grey's Anatomy' Pays Tribute to Eric Dane in Latest Episode

item.title: Mary Cosby Plans to Film 'RHOSLC' Season 7 Despite Son's Sudden Death
